## What does this change?

A short summary of the change and the motivation.

Closes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Wording / docs
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## How was it tested?

Describe how you verified this in a real browser (include camera-flow testing if
gameplay is affected, and note device/OS/browser).

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused (one thing per PR)
- [ ] No build step / framework / bundler added
- [ ] No secrets committed (API keys, reCAPTCHA keys, webhook URLs)
- [ ] Tested on desktop and mobile where relevant
